content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09D","process_rule":"1. Copy the decision table into table `J09D_temp` where the tour starts with `J09D`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `J09D_temp`.

3. Classify meter reading type in `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using these rules:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA` when a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`; else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses in address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09D_temp` with table `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the `SALES_MASTER` customer table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the `NET_MASTER` customer table entries.

8. Identify households with mandatory meter reading:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `MANDATORY_READING` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` in a record created in `2024` and also `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` in a record created in `2023`.

9. Export all `MANDATORY_READING` entries from the final table as CSV file `J09D_MANDATORY_READING` with columns:
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

10. Send `J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to the internal team:
    - `email_address: mandatory.reading@provider.com`
    - `file_path: <file path for J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv here>`

11. Identify trustworthy households for meter reading self-report:
    - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `DIRECT_MAIL` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where `ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP"` in `2024` and also `ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP"` in `2023`.

12. Export all `DIRECT_MAIL` entries from the final table as CSV file `J09D_DIRECT_MAIL` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

13. Send bulk email to all `DIRECT_MAIL` households by uploading the file to the `send_bulk_mail` service for sending direct emails to all customers.

14. Export the final data excluding all `MANDATORY_READING` and `DIRECT_MAIL` entries as CSV file `J09D` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

15. Send an email with CSV file `J09D` to EVU:
    - Email address: `meter.readings@evu.com`
    - `file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>`

16. Delete the temporary table.

17. End process."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy the decision table into table `J09D_temp` where the tour starts with `J09D`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `J09D_temp`.

3. Classify meter reading type in `ENTSCHEIDUNG` using these rules:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA` when a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`; else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses in address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09D_temp` with table `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the `SALES_MASTER` customer table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the `NET_MASTER` customer table entries.

8. Identify households with mandatory meter reading:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `MANDATORY_READING` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` in a record created in `2024` and also `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` in a record created in `2023`.

9. Export all `MANDATORY_READING` entries from the final table as CSV file `J09D_MANDATORY_READING` with columns:
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

10. Send `J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to the internal team:
    - `email_address: mandatory.reading@provider.com`
    - `file_path: <file path for J09D_MANDATORY_READING.csv here>`

11. Identify trustworthy households for meter reading self-report:
    - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `DIRECT_MAIL` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where `ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP"` in `2024` and also `ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP"` in `2023`.

12. Export all `DIRECT_MAIL` entries from the final table as CSV file `J09D_DIRECT_MAIL` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

13. Send bulk email to all `DIRECT_MAIL` households by uploading the file to the `send_bulk_mail` service for sending direct emails to all customers.

14. Export the final data excluding all `MANDATORY_READING` and `DIRECT_MAIL` entries as CSV file `J09D` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

15. Send an email with CSV file `J09D` to EVU:
    - Email address: `meter.readings@evu.com`
    - `file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>`

16. Delete the temporary table.

17. End process.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp; CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%'; ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%'
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.EQUNR) FROM J09D_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09D_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')

args.sql_query: WITH final_data AS ( SELECT jt."HAUS", jt."ANLAGE", jt."ME_MA_ID", jt."EQUNR", jt."HOUSE_NUM1", CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eabl e1 WHERE e1.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR AND e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eabl e2 WHERE e2.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023' ) THEN 'MANDATORY_READING' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eabl e1 WHERE e1.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR AND e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eabl e2 WHERE e2.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023' ) THEN 'DIRECT_MAIL' ELSE jt.ENTSCHEIDUNG END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.TITLE,''), nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.FORENAME,''), nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.SURNAME,''), nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREET,''), nm.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREETNO,''), nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY1,''), nm.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY2,''), nm.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.EMAIL,''), nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL, eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM J09D_temp jt LEFT JOIN eablg eb ON jt.ANLAGE = eb.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON jt.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON jt.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR ) SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM final_data WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

WITH final_data AS ( SELECT jt."HAUS", jt."ANLAGE", jt."ME_MA_ID", jt."EQUNR", jt."HOUSE_NUM1", CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eabl e1 WHERE e1.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR AND e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eabl e2 WHERE e2.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023' ) THEN 'MANDATORY_READING' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eabl e1 WHERE e1.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR AND e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eabl e2 WHERE e2.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023' ) THEN 'DIRECT_MAIL' ELSE jt.ENTSCHEIDUNG END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.TITLE,''), nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.FORENAME,''), nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.SURNAME,''), nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREET,''), nm.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREETNO,''), nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY1,''), nm.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY2,''), nm.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.EMAIL,''), nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL, eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM J09D_temp jt LEFT JOIN eablg eb ON jt.ANLAGE = eb.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON jt.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON jt.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR ) SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM final_data WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

WITH final_data AS ( SELECT jt."HAUS", jt."ANLAGE", jt."ME_MA_ID", jt."EQUNR", jt."HOUSE_NUM1", CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eabl e1 WHERE e1.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR AND e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eabl e2 WHERE e2.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023' ) THEN 'MANDATORY_READING' WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eabl e1 WHERE e1.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR AND e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eabl e2 WHERE e2.EQUNR = jt.EQUNR AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023' ) THEN 'DIRECT_MAIL' ELSE jt.ENTSCHEIDUNG END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.TITLE,''), nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.FORENAME,''), nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.SURNAME,''), nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREET,''), nm.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREETNO,''), nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY1,''), nm.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY2,''), nm.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.EMAIL,''), nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL, eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM J09D_temp jt LEFT JOIN eablg eb ON jt.ANLAGE = eb.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON jt.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON jt.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR ) SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM final_data WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')
